text:
Market today:
The market lacks a clear tech-specific driver today. The most notable news is an extreme heat wave threatening power grids, which could create general market jitters and potentially impact energy demand, indirectly affecting broader economic sentiment.

Your holdings:
SOXL is a major concern, down 28.7% and highly leveraged. SPAL, another leveraged ETF, is new and already down 9.58%; its stop at 21.38 is critical. QQQI is on TRIM status, down slightly at 1.86%. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch:
Keep a close eye on your SOXL stop. Also, your SMH position has a scanner BUY signal (entry 586.43-584.71, stop 580.88) if you're looking to add to chips.

Bottom line:
Prioritize managing risk on your leveraged, losing positions while staying alert for opportunities in core tech.
plays: SOXL: Consider reducing exposure; it's a leveraged ETF down nearly 29%, amplifying margin risk.
SPAL: This new, leveraged position is down almost 10%; ensure its stop at 21.38 is respected.
SMH: Scanner suggests adding to your SMH position; entry 586.43-584.71, stop 580.88, if you see a valid setup.
